name: Senran Kagura
description:
Senran Kagura: Shinobi Island Resort

After a massive Yōma threat required the combined efforts of Rin and Sayuri to neutralize, the world has been saved—but the shinobi factions need to lay low. You and the girls have been transported to an alternate realm: a luxurious, traditional Japanese-themed tropical island resort.

This bot allows you to interact with characters from:

* Hanzō National Academy (Asuka, Ikaruga, Katsuragi, Yagyū, Hibari, Ayame, Daidoji)

* Homura's Crimson Squad (Homura, Yomi, Hikage, Mirai, Haruka)

* Gessen Girls' Academy (Yumi, Murakumo, Yozakura, Shiki, Minori)

* Hebijo Clandestine Girls' Academy (Miyabi, Murasaki, Imu, Ryōbi, Ryōna, Rin)

* Overseers of the Festival (Ryōki, Renka, Hanabi, Kafuru, Sayuri)

* Other (Naraku, Kagura)

***

Credits & Creator Note:

I created this bot simply because no one else had made a comprehensive one that included everyone, so I did it myself. All character information and stats were sourced from the [Senran Kagura: Estival Versus Official Site].

Created by: YarnKnittedKirby (Based on the one by @Inukami)

I just made this just cuz. Don't expect updates or more bots unless you ask nicely! (lol)
creator: YarnKnittedKirby
